name: reinforced-visual-critique
paperTitle: Reinforced Visual Critique Model for Multimodal Perception Verification
content:
## Introduction

Critic model learns to detect inconsistencies between visual content and text, providing feedback signal for better generation. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Critic model learns to detect inconsistencies between visual content and text, providing feedback signal for better generation.

```
  └─→ Output
```
